executiveSummary: The scanner detected an issue related to Technology Stack Fingerprinted: Vercel. This represents a security risk on the target asset.
riskExplanation:
The exposure of this module (technology) allows external clients to gather detail, potentially assisting in targeted reconnaissance. The following technology components were detected on https://supabase.com:


### Other Stack Components
* **Vercel** — Detected via HTTPX engine analysis.
businessImpact: Allowing legacy properties to persist increases vulnerability rates, potentially leading to compliance failures under modern regulations like PCI-DSS.
attackScenarios: An attacker retrieves the disclosures from technology to identify misconfigured interfaces and executes tailored exploit scripts.
nextSteps: Verify detected technologies are up-to-date and patched
